name: setlist-add-toast
note: UAT r5 F6 (operator 2026-07-19): the 'Added to setlist' toast needs (a) a longer hold and (b) a tappable 'Go to setlist' action riding in it. Action-toast contract: a toast that carries an action earns the longer timeout (you can't tap what's already gone); the plain 1600ms stays for actionless confirmations. Red-first: pre-fix the toast is text-only and hides before the 2500ms probe.

steps.label: the confirmation toast carries a tappable Go to setlist action
steps.js: (function(){var t=document.querySelector('.toast.withAct.on');if(!t)return false;var b=t.querySelector('button');return /added to setlist/i.test(t.textContent) && !!b && /go to setlist/i.test(b.textContent);})()

steps.label: an action toast holds longer than the plain 1600ms confirmation (still up at ~2.9s)
the action lands on the Setlist tab with the just-added song in the set
